info.title: Ventura Backend Service API
info.description: A comprehensive business management API for handling appointments, orders, invoices, customers, and more

changes: Added /dashboard/summary endpoint with full analytics response schema
Added /audit/entity/{entity}/{entityId}, /audit/user/{userId}, /audit/actions endpoints
Added /customers/import endpoint for bulk customer import
Added AuditLog and DashboardSummary response schemas
Fixed Invoice schema: added invoiceType (STANDARD|PROFORMA|RECEIPT), customerName, customerEmail, customerPhone, paymentDate, issueDate fields
Fixed Order schema: added customerName, customerEmail, customerPhone customer snapshot fields
Fixed CreateInvoiceDto: added optional invoiceType field
Fixed CreateAppointmentDto: removed incorrect userId field, added optional customerId field
Fixed UpdateAppointmentDto: removed incorrect userId field from required, added customerId optional
Fixed /auth/resend-code request body: field is id (not email)
Fixed /auth/verify-code request body: added required shortToken field
Fixed /invoices/{id}/payment: paymentDate is optional not required
Added missing UpdateCustomerDto schema
Added invoice type support (STANDARD, PROFORMA, RECEIPT)
Added customer snapshot fields to orders and invoices (customerName, customerEmail, customerPhone)
Added customer import endpoint
Added audit resource module
Added dashboard analytics module
Added email duplication check in customer creation and update
Initial OpenAPI documentation
Auth, User, Business, Customer, Appointment, Order, Invoice, Resource endpoints
Mailer and Assets (image upload) endpoints

isSystem.description: Whether this is a system user

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active

isEmailVerified.description: Whether the user's email is verified

customerName.description: Customer name snapshot at time of order creation

customerEmail.description: Customer email snapshot at time of order creation

customerPhone.description: Customer phone snapshot at time of order creation

customerName.description: Customer name snapshot at time of invoice creation

customerEmail.description: Customer email snapshot at time of invoice creation

customerPhone.description: Customer phone snapshot at time of invoice creation

customerId.description: Optional customer ID to associate with the appointment

recurringFrequency.description: Recurring frequency (required if isRecurring is true)

recurringUntil.description: Recurring until date (required if isRecurring is true)

customerId.description: Optional customer ID to associate with the appointment

recurringFrequency.description: Recurring frequency (required if isRecurring is true)

recurringUntil.description: Recurring until date (required if isRecurring is true)

orderIds.description: Order IDs to include in invoice

UpdateCustomerDto.description: All fields are optional for partial updates

userId.description: ID of the user who performed the action

recentActivity.description: Recent business activity timeline (up to 10 items)

get.description: Returns basic API information
Returns the health status of the API
Redirects to Google OAuth for web authentication

post.description: Authenticate user with Google OAuth token for mobile apps

get.description: Handles Google OAuth callback for web authentication

302.description: Redirect to frontend with user ID

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password
Register a new user account
Verify the email verification code sent to user. Requires shortToken from signup response, the user's email, and the verification code.

shortToken.description: Short token returned from the signup response

code.description: Verification code sent to user's email

post.description: Resend email verification code. Send the user ID returned from signup.

id.description: User ID (returned from the signup response)

post.description: Send verification code for password reset
Reset user password with verification code
Log out the current user
Refresh the access token using refresh token

get.description: Returns a comprehensive analytics summary for a business including financials, stats, alerts, top performers, recent activity, and cancellations. Rate limiting is disabled for this endpoint.

get.summary: Get audit logs for a specific entity record
get.description: Returns all audit logs for a specific entity instance (e.g. a specific order, invoice, or customer)

get.summary: Get audit logs for a specific user
get.description: Returns all audit logs performed by or on a specific user

get.summary: Get audit logs by action type
get.description: Returns all audit logs for a specific action type
